short_description: Request S3 bucket for customer analytics project
description:
We need a new S3 bucket for our customer analytics project to store behavioral data for machine learning models.

Requirements:
- Bucket name: analytics-customer-data-prod
- Environment: Production
- Access needed: Data Science team and analytics-service-account
- Versioning: Required (enabled)
- Encryption: AES-256 server-side encryption
- Lifecycle policy: Delete objects after 7 years (2555 days)
- Public access: Must be blocked
- Cross-region replication: Not required
- Expected data volume: 500GB initially, growing to 5TB
- Access patterns: Write-heavy during ETL, read-heavy during analysis
- Compliance: Must meet GDPR and SOX requirements
